title: TSpack
description: Official modpack for Terra Sancta's SMP.
body:
## TSpack: the Terra Sancta SMP modpack
This modpack was crafted for Terra Sancta's modded SMP server. It features content mods, as well as some optimizations, a custom panorama, and QoL improvements to the main game. Doesn't include server-sided content in order to ease the load on clients.

### How to install
You can install TSpack using the Modrinth app, or a third-party Minecraft launcher with Modrinth integration.
